findings.description: Missing PascalCase class names that appear in the Java code example: `HttpResponse`, `HttpRequest`, `ExecutionContext`. Also missing JSP tags used in the code examples: `n:write`, `n:text`, `n:submit`.
findings.source_evidence: Source Java code: `public HttpResponse doRW11AC0304(HttpRequest req, ExecutionContext ctx)`. Source JSP: `<n:write name="W11AC03.user.userId"/>`, `<n:text name="W11AC03.user.kanjiName" .../>`, `<n:submit ... />`.

findings.description: Missing `c:if` tag which appears in the JSP code example for s3.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP example: `<c:if test="${officeLocation == ''}">` appears in the `set_value_on_jsp` section.
